character_contract.name: Kirishima Mio
character_contract.identity: adult Japanese university sophomore, mature face, gray-blue eyes, long straight black hair with subtle navy sheen, exactly one silver star hairpin on viewer-right side
character_contract.outfit: cream high-neck blouse, fitted dark navy cardigan, long charcoal skirt, opaque black tights, brown loafers
character_contract.style: pure hand-drawn Japanese 2D anime cel style
character_contract.forbidden: child, teen, schoolgirl, school uniform, duplicate hairpin, extra person, cropped feet, changed outfit, photorealistic, 3d

poses.label: 坐姿閱讀天文研究資料

guide_review.notes: Chair and open book present; full body and feet visible; seated-reading pose/anatomy suitable as guide. Identity/outfit intentionally ignored.

reasons: identity failed: orange hair instead of long straight black hair with navy sheen
pose failed: both arms raised overhead instead of holding an open astronomy book
outfit failed: bright red tights and mismatched layered clothing
single silver star hairpin is on the wrong visible side
passed: one adult-presenting subject
real chair present
full body and both shoes visible
plain white background

seated_reading.workflow_type: FLUX.2 Klein native image-reference via ReferenceLatent and MCP custom workflow
seated_reading.submitted_via: not submitted; MCP live resource/node-schema preflight

technical_error.message: No validated FLUX.2 Klein image-reference workflow is available. The prior family workflow failed at CLIPTextEncodeFlux because its live schema requires separate clip_l and t5xxl STRING inputs, while the installed Gemma FLUX.2 encoder path is not compatible with that node shape. Per one-pass policy, this slot is terminal and was not rerouted to backend HTTP or another model family.
technical_error.source: MCP stdio list_available_resources + get_node_schema(CLIPTextEncodeFlux, ReferenceLatent, CLIPLoader, UNETLoader)
